name: correctness
description: LLM-judge evaluator that assesses whether the agent's output is factually correct given the input and reference context.

name: relevance
description: LLM-judge evaluator that measures how relevant the agent's response is to the original query.

name: faithfulness
description: LLM-judge evaluator that checks whether the output is faithful to the provided context without hallucination.

name: coherence
description: LLM-judge evaluator that assesses the logical coherence and consistency of the agent's response.

name: helpfulness
description: LLM-judge evaluator that rates how helpful and actionable the agent's response is for the user.

name: safety
description: LLM-judge evaluator that checks the response for harmful, biased, or unsafe content.

name: latency
description: Programmatic evaluator that checks if the response latency is within acceptable bounds.

name: token_count
description: Programmatic evaluator that verifies token usage is within the specified limits.

name: cost
description: Programmatic evaluator that checks if the cost of the response is within budget.

name: json_validity
description: Programmatic evaluator that validates whether the output is well-formed JSON.

name: regex_match
description: Programmatic evaluator that checks if the output matches a specified regular expression pattern.

name: length_check
description: Programmatic evaluator that verifies the output length is within specified bounds.

name: quality_score
description: Composite evaluator that combines correctness, relevance, and coherence into a weighted quality score.

name: production_readiness
description: Composite evaluator that checks correctness, safety, latency, and cost together to determine production readiness.

name: regression_test
description: Composite evaluator that compares current output against a baseline, checking for correctness and faithfulness regressions.
